pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support the 'release' flag and Java 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 2.3.2) do not support the <release> configuration option introduced in Java 9, causing build failures or ignoring the setting.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source/target configuration with the unified release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The <source> and <target> flags are deprecated in favor of <release> for Java 9+ to ensure consistent API usage and class file versioning; using old flags with Java 11 source code may lead to compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities.
